arts.ttl: Inside the Hull City dressing room as Ruben Selles' team aim to take giant step towards safety
arts.sum: "I wouldn't say (it's squeaky bum time), I wouldn't say so no, even if it seems like that as an outsider looking in, but we've got to take it game by game and keep fighting and keep digging deep, to put points on the board. Three points for City would move the Tigers six points clear of the Pilgrims with 11 games of the season left to play, and in the process, secure a first home win of 2025 and just a third of the campaign so far.

arts.ttl: Time for Hull City to stand up and be counted in biggest home game of the season
arts.sum: The time is now for Hull City to grasp their chance to take a major step towards ensuring they're a Championship club next season, and not one languishing in the depths of League One. Just as they did last season when game after game went by and City failed to grasp a play-off place, if they're not careful, the same will happen this time round, but with far graver consequences.

arts.ttl: Mixed Hull City injury news as the Tigers prepare for vital Plymouth Argyle clash
arts.sum: Selles will also now be unable to call upon Crooks' fellow January arrival Eliot Mazato after he became the third Tigers player this season to suffer an ACL knee injury, which he picked up in last week's tepid 1-0 loss at Cardiff City, and loan signing Louie Barry who has returned to Aston Villa for treatment on a knee ligament injury he suffered in the success at Sunderland. Palmer has not played since coming off with an ankle problem in the defeat at the Jamaican's former club Coventry City before Christmas, but his return is a timely boost for City given the other injury concerns that have multiplied in the past 10 days.

arts.ttl: Hull City, West Brom and Blackburn Rovers keen on 22-year-old midfielder
arts.sum: Hull City, West Brom and Blackburn Rovers are interested in Dundee midfielder Josh Mulligan, according to a report… The post Hull City, West Brom and Blackburn Rovers keen on 22-year-old midfielder appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City notebook as ex-Tigers man loses his job and relegation rivals handed big boost
arts.sum: Hull City kick off a pivotal four-game spell over the next two weeks with a crucial home meeting with Plymouth Argyle on Tuesday night. Matt Bloomfield notched his first win as Luton Town boss on Saturday beating Portsmouth 1-0 to move off the bottom of the league and within two points of the Tigers, and the pair set to meet at the MKM Stadium at the end of the month in an early kick-off.

arts.ttl: Josh Mulligan eyed by Hull City for cross-border transfer snip as Dundee star's suitor list swells
arts.sum: The 22-year-old is out of contract in the summer and a string of clubs south of the border are keeping tabs on him

arts.sum: Hull City are interested in appointing David Moyes Jr for a scouting position, according to reporter Alan Nixon… The post Hull City interested in landing son of Everton boss in scouting position appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle boss has already told Hull City what to expect in relegation six-pointer
arts.sum: Miron Muslic has challenged his Plymouth Argyle players to show the level of courage and spirit they did at Manchester City on Saturday night in their remaining 12 games, starting against Hull City tomorrow night. They are three points behind City, who have won just twice at home this season, while the Pilgrims are yet to win on the road in the second tier.
